sourceMovie.title: Good Boy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Good Boy (2026) as a thriller theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The thriller and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Boy clicked for you, The Killing of a Sacred Deer (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Good Boy?
faq.answer: Try The Killing of a Sacred Deer, Disturbia, The Client—each shares DNA with Good Boy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Good Boy?
faq.answer: Good Boy (2026) is best described as Thriller, Drama, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Good Boy worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
